I am booked next weekend. LA for World Cup the weekend of the 13/14. Grandma’s marathon 20/21.  I have prestwick member member on the 7/11/12 but the tee times are in the AM. Latest tee off is probably 9:30am, but Sunday I have a soccer game I would like to play in. In other words, could fire a scramble in the afternoon/evening on the 11th but would much prefer the weekend before. Tight window.

initial_survey:
Out of the following courses, please pick your 5 favorites.

We will be playing Keller, Meadowbrook, Braemar, and Baker as 4 pre-selected courses. We will be voting on which other 4 courses to pick.

To be clear, "Meadowbrook twice" and "Keller twice" would mean we will play either of those courses a second time within the season.

Summer Solstice Scramble event: Would you rather play with your teammate in a 2-man scramble or pair up with another team of 2 for a 4-man scramble? The scramble will use handicap strokes per USGA recommendations and count for league standings.

Any other thoughts, comments, concerns?
Thank you for filling out the survey!
